metadata.name: Scout a College Player for the Draft

description: A pro team is evaluating a top college player ahead of the upcoming draft.

nodes.task_description: Compile the player's college career statistics and any available athletic combine data (e.g., 40-yard dash time).

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers all available quantitative data on the player.

nodes.task_description: Analyze game footage to assess their skills against pro-level competition.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a detailed report on the player's strengths and weaknesses.

nodes.task_description: Conduct a background check and review interviews to assess character and intangibles.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers information on the player's character and work ethic.

nodes.task_description: Create a final draft profile and assign a draft grade to the player.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a comprehensive profile, grading the player as a 'top 10 pick'.
